description_long: This helicopter features a streamlined fuselage with a prominent main rotor and a tail boom extending to a smaller tail rotor. The main rotor consists of long, slender blades, while the tail rotor is mounted perpendicularly at the end of the tail boom. The landing gear comprises two parallel skids attached to the underside of the fuselage, providing stable ground support. The cockpit area is located at the front, with multiple windows for visibility, though the details of the window framing are subtle. The exterior appears to be primarily constructed from metal and composite materials, with a dark, matte finish and minimal visible markings. The overall design suggests a utilitarian helicopter suitable for urban or light utility roles.
description: A streamlined helicopter with a large main rotor, tail rotor, and parallel landing skids, finished in a dark matte color.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main rotor blades extending horizontally and the narrow profile of the cockpit and landing skids.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full span of the main rotor, tail rotor, and the overall layout of the helicopter's components.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, tail rotor, and the parallel landing skids beneath the fuselage.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the landing skids, underside of the fuselage, and the arrangement of the main and tail rotors.
attribute_rotor_blades: The main rotor has two long, narrow blades made of composite material, colored black with no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: The tail rotor is present at the end of the tail boom, featuring two blades oriented vertically, also black with no visible markings or protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: The landing skids are parallel, tubular, and metallic, colored black, with visible crossbars for structural support.
attribute_cockpit_windows: The cockpit has multiple windows, including a large front window and smaller side panels, all slightly tinted and framed with thin borders.
